scripts.build: pnpm --filter ./packages/common build && pnpm --filter ./packages/client build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('packages/client/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter ./packages/common type-check && pnpm --filter ./packages/common build && pnpm --filter ./packages/server type-check && pnpm --filter ./packages/client type-check
scripts.check:deploy: pnpm type-check && pnpm test:server && pnpm build && pnpm build:server
